name: Rating display
when_to_use: 需要突出一个汇总评分、量尺与评价数量时用它：适合产品口碑、审核得分、满意度或质量摘要。要比较多个候选项的多个指标用 scorecard-bars；需要用户点击星星提交评分时应使用输入组件，本条只读。
why_valuable: 纯文本 “4.7/5” 缺少量尺感和可信度上下文，手写星星又常在小数填充、深色主题和无障碍标签上出错；本模板把分数徽章、部分填充星/分段条和 count 统一成一个紧凑只读摘要。

data_in.note: data 的核心标量是 score；max 默认 5 且限制在 2–10，score 会夹到 0–max。display='stars' 显示可部分填充的星形量尺，display='segments' 显示分段量尺。count 是可选评价数；precision 仅支持 0 或默认 1 位显示，不改变原始 score。

schema.score: number —— 汇总评分标量；渲染时夹到 0–max
schema.max?: number —— 量尺上限，四舍五入后限制为 2–10；默认 5
schema.title?: string —— 评分对象或摘要标题；省略时显示 “Rating”
schema.label?: string —— 标题上方的小标签；省略时显示 “Average rating”
schema.count?: number —— 非负评价数量，四舍五入并使用千分位显示
schema.display?: 'stars'|'segments' —— 只读量尺样式；默认 stars
schema.precision?: 0|1 —— 分数徽章的小数位；0 为整数，其余值按 1 位
schema.caption?: string —— 量尺下方解释；省略时自动显示 “score / max overall score”

spec.note: 固定为紧凑双栏摘要，560px 以下折为上下两块；max 最多 10 以避免星形过宽。无 vh/百分比高度。

en.when_to_use: Use it to emphasize one aggregate score, its scale, and the number of ratings, including product sentiment, review scores, satisfaction, or quality summaries. To compare several candidates across several metrics, use scorecard-bars. For users to click stars and submit a rating, use an input component; this entry is read-only.
en.why_valuable: Plain text such as "4.7/5" lacks a sense of scale and credibility context, while hand-written stars often fail at fractional fills, dark themes, and accessible labels. This template unifies a score badge, partially filled stars or segmented scale, and count in one compact read-only summary.

data_in.note: The core scalar is data.score. max defaults to 5 and is limited to 2-10; score is clamped to 0-max. display='stars' shows stars with partial fills, while display='segments' shows a segmented scale. count is an optional number of ratings. precision supports only 0 or the default 1 decimal place for display and does not alter the original score.

schema.score: number -- aggregate score scalar; clamped to 0-max when rendered
schema.max?: number -- scale maximum, rounded and limited to 2-10; default 5
schema.title?: string -- rated subject or summary title; displays "Rating" when omitted
schema.label?: string -- small label above the title; displays "Average rating" when omitted
schema.count?: number -- non-negative rating count, rounded and displayed with thousands separators
schema.precision?: 0|1 -- decimal places in the score badge; 0 gives an integer, all other values use 1 decimal place
schema.caption?: string -- explanation below the scale; automatically displays "score / max overall score" when omitted

spec.note: A compact two-column summary that stacks into two blocks below 560px. max is capped at 10 to prevent the star scale from becoming too wide. No vh or percentage heights.

example._why: 示例是可识别的顾客评分，覆盖小数星形填充、5 分量尺、千分位评价数和解释文案。

minimal.title: Customer experience
minimal.label: Verified buyers
minimal.caption: Excellent · top 8% of products in this category

uplink: display-only：星形或分段条不可点击，组件不采集评分，也不向 AI 回传数据。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
